candel
  • API Reference
  • candel.field
  • View page source

candel.field

Field interpolation

Scripts to load fields that have been previously interpolated at the line of sight of galaxies and saved to HDF5 files, typically this is done with the csiborgtools package.

candel.field.field_interp.apply_gaussian_smoothing(field, smooth_scale, boxsize, make_copy=False)[source]

Apply Gaussian smoothing to a 3D field using FFTs. Units of smooth_scale must match that of boxsize.

candel.field.field_interp.build_regular_interpolator(field, boxsize, fill_value=None)[source]

A regular grid interpolator for a 3D field.

candel.field.field_interp.interpolate_los_density_velocity(field_loader, r, RA, dec, smooth_target=None, verbose=True)[source]

Interpolate the density and velocity fields along the line of sight specified by RA and dec at radial steps r from the observer. The former is expected in degrees, while the latter in Mpc / h.

Field loaders

Scripts to load the existing 3D density and velocity fields so that they can be interpolated along the line of sight of galaxies.

candel.field.loader.smooth_clip(x, eps=0.001)[source]
class candel.field.loader.BaseFieldLoader[source]

Bases: ABC

Base class for loading the 3D density and velocity fields.

property observer_pos

Observer position; defaults to box center. Override via self._observer_pos in subclass __init__.

abstractmethod load_density()[source]
abstractmethod load_velocity()[source]
class candel.field.loader.Carrick2015_FieldLoader(path_density, path_velocity, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: BaseFieldLoader

Class to load the Carrick+2015 3D density and velocity fields [1], which can be obtained from `http://cosmicflows.iap.fr. The fields are in Galactic coordinates.

[1] https://arxiv.org/abs/1504.04627

Parameters:

  • path_density (str) – Path to the Carrick+2015 density field.

  • path_velocity (str) – Path to the Carrick+2015 velocity field.

load_density()[source]
load_velocity()[source]
class candel.field.loader.Lilow2024_FieldLoader(path_density, path_velocity_x, path_velocity_y, path_velocity_z, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: BaseFieldLoader

Class to load the Lilow+2024 3D density and velocity fields [1]. The fields are expected to be in Galactic coordinates.

[1] https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.02278

Parameters:

  • path_density (str) – Path to the Lilow+2024 density field.

  • path_velocity_x (str) – Path to the Lilow+2024 velocity field (x-component).

  • path_velocity_y (str) – Path to the Lilow+2024 velocity field (y-component).

  • path_velocity_z (str) – Path to the Lilow+2024 velocity field (z-component).

load_density()[source]
load_velocity()[source]
class candel.field.loader.CF4_FieldLoader(folder, nsim, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: BaseFieldLoader

Class to load the CF4 3D density and velocity fields [1]. The fields are expected to be in Galactic coordinates.

[1] https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.16390

Parameters:

  • folder (str) – Directory containing the CF4 FITS files (e.g. “…/CF4gp_23avr24_256-z008_test_100_realizations”).

  • nsim (int) – Realization index to load.

load_density()[source]
load_velocity()[source]
class candel.field.loader.CLONES_FieldLoader(file_path, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: BaseFieldLoader

Class to load the CLONES z=0 density and velocity fields in supergalactic Cartesian coordinates.

Parameters:

  • basedir (str) – Directory containing the CLONES HDF5 files.

  • fname (str) – Name of the HDF5 file to load.

load_density()[source]
load_velocity()[source]
class candel.field.loader.Hamlet_FieldLoader(nsim, fpath_root, version, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: BaseFieldLoader

Loader for HAMLET z = 0 density and velocity fields in supergalactic coordinates.

Parameters:

  • nsim (int) – Simulation index starting from 0.

  • fpath_root (str) – Root directory pointing to the HAMLET_V0 or HAMLET_V1 dataset.

  • version (int) – Dataset version, either 0 or 1.

load_density()[source]
load_velocity()[source]
class candel.field.loader.CSiBORG_FieldLoader(nsim, fpath_root, version, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: BaseFieldLoader

Class to load CSiBORG1/2 z=0 SPH fields, in the ICRS frame.

Parameters:

  • nsim (int) – Simulation index (ranging from 0, not the MCMC step).

  • fpath_root (str) – Root directory for the simulation files.

  • version ({"csiborg1", "csiborg2"}) – Which CSiBORG version to load (sets boxsize and unit conversion).

load_density()[source]
load_velocity()[source]
class candel.field.loader.Manticore_FieldLoader(nsim, fpath_root)[source]

Bases: BaseFieldLoader

Manticore field loader class, in the ICRS frame.

Parameters:

  • nsim (int) – Simulation index.

  • paths (Paths, optional) – Paths object. By default, the paths are set to the glamdring paths.

load_density()[source]
load_velocity()[source]
candel.field.loader.name2field_loader(name)[source]

Convert a field name to a field loader class.
